10. Touch feet of father, elders and teachers and take their

11. Do not drink wine or eat non-vegetarian food. Keep good
character.
12. Give gurto moneys on Sundays. Mix gur in kneaded dough
of wheat and give it to the cow or give cha/)iltti with pur to
a cow.
13. Help binds.
14. Do not accept or buy articles related to Sun on Sunday.

16. Give coconut and almonds in temple. If not posSible then
